settings.title: What is the class schedule?
settings.content:
Each class will be one hour long, with a thirty minute break between them. 

Class One: Gift Bag & Tag: 1pm UK / 8am ET

Class Two: Box with Shaker-style Lid: 2:30pm UK / 9:30am ET

Class Three: Two Christmas Greeting Cards: 4pm UK / 11am ET 

Class Four: Embossed & Coloured Card: 5:30pm UK / 12:30pm ET 

Class Five: Fancy Fold Card: 7pm UK / 2pm ET

settings.title: Where will I watch?
settings.content: These classes will be streamed live through Vimeo. You do not have to sign up for a free account, but you must have an account and be logged in to chat with us live.

settings.title: Can I watch Vimeo on my chosen device(s)?
settings.content: Yes, Vimeo can be easily viewed on your phone or tablet (they have an easy to use app) or on your computer. Depending on your smart TV, you can also mirror the screen to display the livestreams there, but you will still need your phone, tablet, or computer to chat. Check Vimeo’s FAQs if you have more questions about using the service.

settings.title: How do I find the links to the classes?
settings.content: We’ve pulled them all together in a handy list you'll receive via email. After each livestream, the videos will temporarily go into processing so we can add chapter breaks to make it easier for you to re-watch, and then they will be accessible via the links below and a password we will share during the live event.

settings.title: Why will the replays become password protected?
settings.content: We’re committed to ensuring that these videos remain exclusive to everyone who purchased them. We ask that you not share the video links, or the password, with others.

settings.title: What do I need to prepare ahead of the classes?
settings.content: We recommend you put your supplies in small containers, or easy to grab piles, ahead of the classes just to make it easier to have what you need at hand. You don’t need to do any other prep work ahead of time, but if you’d like to start by pre-cutting some of your pieces we’ve put a handy list of supplies and measurements in the booklet we sent earlier this week. If you missed it, you can see it here.

settings.heading: Christmas in the Making LIVE FAQs
settings.text:
Hi Crafters! 

We hope you’re as excited as we are about our festive cardmaking event this weekend! Everything you need to know about accessing the classes is included below:
settings.faq_footer_text:
And finally, we have a top tip for you - if you don’t see the class automatically go live at the specified time, refresh your page. We’ve seen a few instances where that helps! 

If you need anything else, you can reach out to community@crafterscompanion.co.uk and we will make every effort to help ahead of the classes!
